name: Ramon Delgado
personality: Ramon is a street‑savvy chronicler who knows every bodega owner and block party host. He’s pragmatic, quick‑witted, and always on the lookout for the next scandal that will sell papers.
quirk: He carries a battered notebook with a doodle of a coffee cup on every margin, insisting it brings him good leads.
voice: ‘Yo, that’s the scoop you’ve been waitin’ for!’
daily: Morning coffee at a corner cart, scans Instagram for drama, hits the streets for interviews, and winds down editing stories on his cracked laptop.
